mapper.select:
SELECT C.company_id , C.company_name , CH.checkup_year , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_name , CA.company_archive_id , CA.title , CA.registered_at , CA.sent_at , CAF.company_archive_file_id , CAF.archive_filename , CAF.archive_filename AS org_filename , CA.registered_at
FROM company_archive CA LEFT JOIN company_archive_file CAF ON CA.company_archive_id = CAF.company_archive_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CC ON CA.checkup_contract_id = CC.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CH ON CC.company_checkup_id = CH.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON CC.hospital_id = H.hospital_id LEFT JOIN company C ON CH.company_id = C.company_id WHERE CA.deleted_at IS NULL
AND CA.type = 1
AND CA.type = 0
ORDER BY CA.registered_at DESC

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_name , CH.checkup_year , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_name , CA.company_archive_id , CA.title , CA.registered_at , CA.sent_at , CAF.company_archive_file_id , CAF.archive_filename , CAF.archive_filename AS org_filename , CA.registered_at FROM company_archive CA LEFT JOIN company_archive_file CAF ON CA.company_archive_id = CAF.company_archive_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CC ON CA.checkup_contract_id = CC.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CH ON CC.company_checkup_id = CH.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON CC.hospital_id = H.hospital_id LEFT JOIN center HC ON H.hospital_id = HC.hospital_id LEFT JOIN company C ON CH.company_id = C.company_id WHERE CA.deleted_at IS NULL AND HC.center_id = (SELECT center_id FROM center_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId})
AND CA.type = 1
AND CA.type = 0
ORDER BY CA.registered_at DESC

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_name , CH.checkup_year , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_name , CA.company_archive_id , CA.title , CA.registered_at , CA.sent_at , CAF.company_archive_file_id , CAF.archive_filename , CAF.archive_filename AS org_filename , CA.registered_at FROM company_archive CA LEFT JOIN company_archive_file CAF ON CA.company_archive_id = CAF.company_archive_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CC ON CA.checkup_contract_id = CC.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CH ON CC.company_checkup_id = CH.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON CC.hospital_id = H.hospital_id LEFT JOIN center HC ON H.hospital_id = HC.hospital_id LEFT JOIN company C ON CH.company_id = C.company_id WHERE CA.deleted_at IS NULL AND CA.sent_at IS NOT NULL AND C.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId})
AND CA.type = 1
AND CA.type = 0
ORDER BY CA.registered_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO company_archive ( checkup_contract_id , title , type , registered_at , registered_user_id , created_user_id , updated_user_id ) VALUES( (SELECT checkup_contract_id FROM checkup_contract JOIN company_checkup ON checkup_contract.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.company_id = #{companyId} AND company_checkup.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} WHERE checkup_contract.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}) , #{title} , #{type} , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
